profile_summary: Solo traveler (mid budget) prioritizing spa & wellness, cleanliness.

recommendations.justification: The Regent Heights, Lisbon ranks #1 for this traveler on spa & wellness (+0.92), cleanliness (+0.89), weighted by what matters most to them. Guests note: "The spa was a highlight — incredible massages and a serene relaxation pool."

supporting_evidence.quote: The spa was a highlight — incredible massages and a serene relaxation pool.
Wonderful wellness facilities; the sauna and treatments left us completely refreshed.
Housekeeping was impeccable; the room was fresh every single day.
